generation_summary.note: Stage 4 generated Tier 0 validation states, the Tier 1 point-IK benchmark, and Tier 2-4 trajectory/trial definitions from the real KR810 model with sequential-DLS reachability validation. No Tier 0-4 evaluation has been run; tiers_included above remain scope declarations only, not completion claims.

acceptance_criteria.note: The following thresholds are project-defined acceptance criteria for this dataset's own evaluation pipeline. They are not ISO 9283 certification limits and no ISO 9283 certification is claimed.

notes: Stage 2 integrated the KR810 asset pipeline: assets/kr810.urdf, assets/meshes/a810/*.stl, and assets/kr810.xml are populated and load in MuJoCo (see assets/ASSET_CONVERSION_REPORT.md and assets/model_metadata.json). This is asset/model integration only; no Tier 0 kinematic validation, benchmark, or trajectory generation has been performed.
Stage 3 implemented and unit-tested FK, the geometric/finite-difference Jacobian, SO(3) rotation utilities, pose error, and the DLS solver.

Stage 4 generated real, seed-deterministic Tier 0 validation states, the Tier 1 point-IK benchmark (1200 samples, 6 difficulty groups, quantile-derived thresholds), and Tier 2-4 trajectory/trial definitions (8 trajectories x 400 waypoints, 360 trial rows), all produced from the real KR810 model with SHA256 checksums and sequential-DLS reachability validation at generation time. algorithms/, evaluation/, and pipelines/ remain unimplemented; no Tier 0-4 evaluation has been run and no tier status is claimed complete.
